codeReview.summary: Fix properly addresses all 6 VAL-HEALTH-005 exit code issues from the original health-check-command feature. All fmt.Errorf() calls have been replaced with the correct specialized error types (UsageError, AuthError, RetryableError) from the internal/errors package. Build succeeds, go vet passes.

summary: The health-exit-codes-fix feature successfully resolves all 6 blocking issues from the original health-check-command review. All error returns now use the correct specialized error types from internal/errors package, which properly implement the ExitCoder interface for VAL-HEALTH-005 compliance.
